title: Xian‘s Murasama
description: Added the weapon from Terraria's Calamity Mod — Murasama.
body:
![murasama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3285b746343f06147f54368b1ee86141799d972.png)

## English Introduction

**Added the weapon from Terraria's Calamity Mod — Murasama.**
 

**But that's not all!**
 

Featuring cross-compatibility with **L_Ender 's Cataclysm**, **Re:Avaritia**, **Allthemodium**, **Goety Revelation**, **Legendary Monsters**,and more, offering a wide variety of Murasama variants. More integrations are on the way...

**Note:**
- Some weapons require right-clicking to unsheathe and unleash their true power.
- Cross-compatibility weapons need the corresponding mods to be crafted, but you can enjoy them freely in Creative mode (or you can add alternative crafting recipes for them).

## 中文介绍

**添加了来自泰拉瑞亚灾厄模组的武器——鬼妖村正**
 

**不止如此！**
 

联动了**灾变**、**无尽贪婪重生（Re:Avaritia）**、**Allthemodium**、**诡厄巫法：启示录**、**传奇怪物**等，更多的不同种类的鬼妖村正。未来还会联动更多......

**注意事项：**
- 部分武器需要右键出鞘才能发挥出真正的力量
- 联动武器需要对应的模组才能合成，但创造模式可以畅玩（或者你可以为他们添加另一种合成表）
